text:
A commit references this bug:

Log:
  MFC r337055:
  Avoid assertion in /dev/ufssuspend when the suspend ioctl is
  (incorrectly) called while another suspension is already active.

  PR:	230220

Changes:
_U  stable/11/
  stable/11/sys/ufs/ffs/ffs_suspend.c
